description_long: This object consists of three small plastic water bottles arranged on a flat blue surface. Each bottle is cylindrical with a clear, transparent body and a blue screw cap. The bottles have visible labels with blue and white color schemes, featuring text and branding elements. The plastic material is glossy, reflecting light and giving the bottles a sleek appearance. The bottles appear to be filled with clear liquid, likely water, up to a high level. The overall size of each bottle is compact, suitable for single-use consumption in urban environments.
description: Three small, clear plastic water bottles with blue caps and blue-white labels, arranged together on a blue surface. The bottles are glossy, transparent, and appear nearly full.
description_view_0: A distant frontal view showing a single bottle clearly in the center, with the other two partially obscured behind it.
description_view_1: A side view displaying all three bottles in a row, with their labels and blue caps visible.
description_view_2: A rear view with the bottles aligned, showing the backs of the labels and the curvature of the bottles.
description_view_3: An angled view revealing the arrangement of the three bottles, with their labels and caps visible from the side.
attribute_label_or_branding: Each bottle has a blue and white label with text and branding elements, wrapped around the midsection. The labels are medium-sized, with bold blue and white colors and some black text, but the specific wording is not legible.
attribute_cap_type: Screw cap; short, cylindrical, blue in color, with visible ridges for grip.
attribute_transparency: The bottle body is fully transparent, allowing clear visibility of the liquid inside. The cap and label are opaque.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, narrow neck with visible threading for the screw cap; slightly flared at the top with ridges for grip.
